name: @swarmai/channel-whatsapp-baileys
description: SwarmAI channel plugin: WhatsApp Personal via Baileys (direct WebSocket, light, fast text). Pair as a linked device.
//deps: @whiskeysockets/baileys + qrcode-terminal are real (non-optional) runtime deps so the Hub install can resolve them. Workspace @swarmai/* deps are peerDependencies (host provides them) with file: devDependencies for local-build testing only.
//channel-kind: Channel kind is PRESERVED as 'whatsapp-personal' (NOT 'whatsapp-baileys'). Existing operator pairings reference this kind in workspace configs, approval ledgers, and session storage paths. See docs/38-whatsapp-dual-plugin-plan.md §Channel-kind preservation.
